verses.text: I am James, a servant of God and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I am writing this letter to the 12 tribes of Israel who are scattered all over the world. I greet you:
My brothers and sisters, be joyful when different kinds of testing happen.
You must know that God is testing your faith, and when you suffer like this, you learn to be patient and to keep on believing.
If you let that patience work in you, the end result will be good. You will be mature and complete. You will be all that God wants you to be.
Do any of you need wisdom? Ask God for it. God will give it to you freely and will not rebuke us for asking. God will give you wisdom.
But when you ask God, you must believe. Don’t doubt God Whoever doubts is like a wave in the sea that is blown up and down by the wind.
A person who doubts must not think that God will give him something.
Someone who doubts does not know what to decide. He never knows what he must do, because he is not sure.
Believers who are in humble circumstances should be glad that God considers them so important.
Believers who are rich should be glad when bad things happen that humble them. Their riches won’t keep them from disappearing as quickly as wildflowers

When the sun starts to shine and the day gets hot, the wildflowers die and fall off. The beautiful flowers are dead. It is the same with a rich man and the things that he has. They will disappear like a flower James 12 Great blessings belong to the people who are tempted and remain faithful! After they have proved their faith, God will give them the crown of life. God promised this to all people who love him.

When you are tempted to do things that wrong, you must not say: It is God who wants me to do bad things, because no one can tell God to do things that are wrong and He does not want people to do things that are wrong.
Anyone who does things that are wrong does them because he desires to do them.
When these desires give birth to sinful actions. And when sin is allowed to grow, it gives birth to death.
My dear brothers and sisters, don’t be fooled about this.

Everything good comes from God. Every perfect gift is from him. These good gifts come down from the Father who made all the lights in the sky. But God never changes like the shadows from those lights. He is always the same.
God chose to give us life. That is why God sent the true message to us. He wanted to make us the first and the most important of all His creatures.
For this reason, my beloved brothers and sisters. Let everyone be quick to hear and understand, slow to speak by choosing our words wisely, slow to anger
Anger does not help you live the way God wants.
So, stop doing bad things and stop saying things that are not good. You must be humble and listen to the Good news that God gave you in your hearts. This is the message that can save you.
Do what the Word of God says. Do not only listen to God’s word but do it. If you don’t do what God says, then you are deceiving yourselves.
Because when someone only listens to the message of God but does not do what God says, he is like a man who looks in a mirror and sees his face.

When he stops looking in the mirror and goes away, he immediately forgets what he looks like. James 125: But when you look into God’s perfect law that sets people free, pay attention to it. If you do what it says, you will have God’s blessing. Never just listen to his teaching and forget what you heard
You might think you are a very religious person. But if your tongue is out of control, you are fooling yourself. and his religion is worthless.

The right way that God the Father wants us to serve Him is to care for children who do not have parents and to help widows who are suffering. And you must keep away from sin and all the things that are wrong in the world.
My dear brothers and sisters, you are believers in our glorious Lord Jesus Christ. So don’t treat some people better than others
Suppose someone comes into your meeting wearing very nice clothes and a gold ring. At the same time a poor person comes in wearing old, dirty clothes.

You show special attention to the person wearing nice shinny clothes. You say, Sit here in this good seat. But you say to the poor person, Stand there!” or “Sit on the floor by our feet! James 2: 4 Doesn’t this show that you think some people are more important than others? You set yourselves up as judges who make bad decisions.
Listen, my dear brothers and sisters. God chose the poor people in the world to be rich in faith. He chose them to receive the kingdom God promised to those who love him
But you show no respect to those who are poor. And you know that the rich are the ones who always try to control your lives. And they are the ones who take you to court.
And the rich are the ones who insult the wonderful name of Christ, the name by which you are known
One law rules over all other laws. This royal law is found in the Scriptures: “Love your neighbor the same as you love yourself.” If you obey this law, you are doing right.
But if you are treating one person as more important than another, you are sinning. You are guilty of breaking God’s law.
You might follow all of God’s law. But if you fail to obey only one command, you are guilty of breaking all the commands in that law.
God said, Don’t commit adultery. The same God also said, Don’t kill. So if you don’t commit adultery, but you kill someone, you are guilty of breaking all of God’s law
You will be judged by the law that makes people free. You should remember this in everything you say and do.
Yes, you must show mercy to others. If you do not show mercy, then God will not show mercy to you when he judges you. But the one who shows mercy can stand without fear before the Judge.

3.source: Drafted from the public-domain King James Version in the simple-English style of this Bible.

verses.text: My brothers and sisters, not many of you should become teachers. You know that we who teach will be judged more strictly.
We all make many mistakes. If anyone never says anything wrong, that person is mature and able to control his whole body.
When we put a bit into a horse's mouth to make it obey us, we can turn the whole animal.
Or think of ships. Even though they are large and pushed by strong winds, a very small rudder steers them wherever the pilot wants to go.
In the same way, the tongue is a small part of the body, but it brags about great things. Think how a tiny spark can set a great forest on fire!
The tongue is like a fire. Among the parts of the body, the tongue is a whole world of evil. It dirties the whole person, sets a person's whole life on fire, and is itself set on fire by hell.
People have tamed every kind of animal, bird, reptile, and sea creature, and they keep on taming them.
But no one can tame the tongue. It is restless and evil, full of deadly poison.
With the tongue we praise our Lord and Father, and with the same tongue we curse people, who are made to be like God.
Praise and curses come out of the same mouth. My brothers and sisters, this should not be.
Can fresh water and bitter water flow from the same spring?
My brothers and sisters, can a fig tree grow olives, or a grapevine grow figs? No. And salty water cannot give fresh water either.
Who among you is wise and understanding? Let that person show it by a good life, by doing good things with the humility that comes from wisdom.
But if your hearts are full of bitter jealousy and selfishness, do not brag about it or deny the truth.
That kind of “wisdom” does not come from heaven. It is earthly, unspiritual, and from the devil.
For wherever there is jealousy and selfishness, there is trouble and every kind of evil.
But the wisdom that comes from heaven is first of all pure. Then it is peace-loving, gentle, and willing to give in. It is full of mercy and good deeds, fair, and honest.
People who make peace plant seeds of peace and harvest a life that is right with God.

4.source: Drafted from the public-domain King James Version in the simple-English style of this Bible.

verses.text: What causes fights and arguments among you? Do they not come from the desires that battle inside you?
You want something but do not get it, so you are ready to kill. You are jealous, but you cannot get what you want, so you argue and fight. You do not have, because you do not ask God.
And when you do ask, you do not receive, because you ask with wrong motives, so that you can spend it on your own pleasures.
You unfaithful people! Do you not know that loving the world means hating God? Anyone who chooses to be a friend of the world makes himself an enemy of God.
Or do you think the Scripture means nothing when it says that the spirit God put in us wants us all for himself?
But God gives us more grace. That is why the Scripture says: God is against the proud, but he gives grace to the humble.
So give yourselves to God. Stand against the devil, and he will run away from you.
Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Wash your hands, you sinners, and make your hearts pure, you who cannot decide.
Be sorry, be sad, and cry. Turn your laughter into sadness and your joy into gloom.
Make yourselves low before the Lord, and he will lift you up.

Brothers and sisters, do not say evil things about each other. Anyone who speaks against a brother or sister, or judges them, speaks against the law and judges the law. And if you judge the law, you are not keeping the law but acting as its judge.
There is only one Lawgiver and Judge, the one who is able to save and to destroy. So who are you to judge your neighbor?
Now listen, you who say: Today or tomorrow we will go to this or that city, spend a year there, do business, and make money.
You do not even know what will happen tomorrow! What is your life? You are like a mist that appears for a little while and then disappears.
Instead, you should say: If the Lord wants, we will live and do this or that.
But as it is, you brag and boast. All such bragging is evil.
So anyone who knows the good he ought to do, but does not do it, is sinning.

5.source: Drafted from the public-domain King James Version in the simple-English style of this Bible.

verses.text: Now listen, you rich people. Cry and wail, because of the misery that is coming on you.
Your wealth has rotted, and moths have eaten your clothes.
Your gold and silver are covered with rust. That rust will be a witness against you, and it will eat your flesh like fire. You have stored up treasure for the last days.
Listen! The pay you cheated from the workers who harvested your fields is crying out. The cries of the harvesters have reached the ears of the Lord of heaven's armies.
You have lived on earth in luxury and pleasure. You have fattened yourselves for the day of slaughter.
You have condemned and murdered innocent people, who were not even fighting back against you.
So be patient, brothers and sisters, until the Lord comes. See how the farmer waits for the precious crop from the ground, being patient until it gets the early and the late rains.
You too must be patient. Keep your hearts strong, because the coming of the Lord is near.
Brothers and sisters, do not complain against one another, or you will be judged. Look, the Judge is standing at the door!
Brothers and sisters, take the prophets who spoke in the name of the Lord as an example of patience in suffering.
We consider blessed those who have kept going. You have heard about Job's patience, and you have seen what the Lord finally did for him. The Lord is full of tenderness and mercy.
Above all, my brothers and sisters, do not make oaths — not by heaven, not by earth, not by anything else. Just let your “Yes” be yes and your “No” be no, or you will be judged.
Is anyone among you suffering? Let him pray. Is anyone happy? Let him sing songs of praise.
Is anyone among you sick? Let him call for the elders of the church to pray over him and to put oil on him in the name of the Lord.
And the prayer offered in faith will make the sick person well; the Lord will raise him up. And if he has sinned, he will be forgiven.
So tell your sins to one another, and pray for one another, so that you may be healed. The prayer of a person who is right with God is powerful and effective.
Elijah was a human being just like us. He prayed hard that it would not rain, and it did not rain on the land for three and a half years.
Then he prayed again, and the sky gave rain, and the earth produced its crops.
My brothers and sisters, if one of you wanders away from the truth, and someone brings him back,
remember this: whoever turns a sinner back from his wrong way will save that person from death and cover over many sins.
